## Stream type

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare type Stream = {
    codec: string;
} & ({
    type: MediaType.VIDEO;
    width: number;
    height: number;
} | {
    type: MediaType.AUDIO;
});
```
**References:** [MediaType.VIDEO](/reference/docs.mediatype)<!-- -->, [MediaType.AUDIO](/reference/docs.mediatype)
